prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Nissan HR12DE (1.2L DOHC 16V)** with a **Garrett GT1544 turbocharger** (TD04-15T compressor wheel, 0.44 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on **HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 stainless headers** and a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for precise wastegate control. Supporting mods include **Nismo forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)** and **Tomei 260° camshafts** with **Ferrea 5000-series valves** and **Supertech valve springs**.

Full **Nismo RS-R coilover suspension** with **22mm front / 20mm rear Whiteline adjustable sway bars**, **Cusco 2-way LSD (1.5/2.0 bias ratio)**, and **Project Mu B-Spec brake pads** paired with **DBA 4000 Series rotors** for 4-pot caliper clamping force. Chassis reinforcement via **Cusco front strut tower bar** and **Nismo rear subframe brace**.

Fuel system upgrade with **Walbro 255 LPH in-tank pump**, **ID1000x injectors**, and a **Link G4+ Xtreme ECU** tuned on **E85 blend** with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** for AFR targeting 11.8:1 under boost. Exhaust system features a **Spoon Sports 4-1 header** (38mm primaries) and **Fujitsubo Authorize R 50mm cat-back** with **MagnaFlow 2.5" resonated mid-pipe**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Otti-specific widebody kit** (FRP construction) with **custom 50mm overfenders**, **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 300mm chord), and **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction). Front bumper lip is **C-West JDM-style** with **integrated LED DRLs** and **custom canards**.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels** (15x6.5 +38 offset, 4x100 PCD) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (185/55R15)**. Fender flares are **painted Nissan Racing Orange (407)** with **blacked-out B-pillar trim** and **JDM Otti RS decals** (replica).

**Recaro SRD-II seats** (fixed-back, carbon-Kevlar shell) with **Takata 4-point harnesses**, **Nismo MOMO steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **Defi BF gauges (boost, oil temp, AFR)** mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod**. Interior stripped of sound deadening, replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme** on floor pans and **carbon fiber door cards** (custom fabrication).
